description_long: This sculpture depicts a stylized bust of a stern-faced human figure with exaggerated facial features, including a pronounced brow, deep-set eyes, and a prominent nose and chin. The head is topped with a voluminous, rounded hairstyle or headpiece, and the neck is elongated, supported by a high, ribbed collar that merges into a cylindrical pedestal. The facial expression is intense and somewhat severe, with furrowed brows and tightly pursed lips. The surface appears to be made of a single, stone-like material with a matte, slightly rough finish. The overall form is monolithic and solid, suggesting a classical or caricatured portrait style.
description: A stylized stone bust of a stern-faced human figure with exaggerated features and a high collar on a cylindrical pedestal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the intense facial expression, deep-set eyes, and prominent nose and chin.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the pronounced profile, voluminous headpiece, and the curvature of the collar.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back of the head and the flared collar, with no facial features visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, emphasizing the sharp profile and the sculpted details of the face and collar.
attribute_location_context: No visible environmental context; background is plain and featureless.
